Plot an SDALGCP2 fit (the phi profile deviance)

Source: R/viz.R
plot.SDALGCP2.Rd

Plot an SDALGCP2 fit (the phi profile deviance)

Usage

# S3 method for class 'SDALGCP2'
plot(x, ...)

Arguments

x

an "SDALGCP2" object.

...

passed to phi_profile.

Value

invisibly, the profile (see phi_profile).
